data.title: CR7 x Binance Collection Offers Unique Fan Experiences in Web3 Era
data.description:
Binance Blog published a new article, revealing insights into a recent trend where football passion meets web3 technology through the CR7 x Binance collection. This initiative offers fans exclusive perks such as autographed merchandise, early content access, and the chance to meet Cristiano Ronaldo in person. Running from June 11 to June 27, 2025, the campaign aims to provide collectors and newcomers with unforgettable real-world moments.

Cristiano Ronaldo's impact on football is unparalleled, and his legacy continues to evolve. The CR7 x Binance collections allow fans worldwide to own a piece of this journey in a novel way, blending digital legacy with tangible benefits. Ahead of the launch of 'Forever To The Moon,' several holders from previous drops shared their experiences, highlighting the unique intersection of technology and fandom. Abdulla, a Drop 4 Grand Prize Winner, expressed his excitement about owning a piece of Ronaldo's legacy and enjoying exclusive content and giveaways. Meeting Cristiano in person was a standout experience, showcasing the collection's value beyond mere ownership.

Sebastian, a Drop 5 Proof of Skill Winner, obtained his collectible through a skills-based contest, emphasizing the dynamic nature of the campaign. His victory not only provided him with a digital collectible but also deepened his understanding of the web3 world. For Sebastian, the CR7 x Binance journey is about engaging and testing one's passion, merging the thrill of sport with digital access. He encourages others to explore the web3 world, especially through an NFT from one of the most followed individuals globally.

The upcoming Drop 6: 'Forever To The Moon' presents an opportunity for fans to join the ranks of winners like Abdulla and Sebastian. With 7,777 mystery boxes available, participants can win rewards such as signed gear, tickets to Binance Blockchain Week, and a 7-minute meet-and-greet with Cristiano Ronaldo. This drop exemplifies the fusion of football and web3, offering real-world benefits to digital fandom. It's a chance to be part of something unforgettable, blending sport and technology in a unique way.

data.title: Blockdaemon Launches Earn Stack to Enhance Institutional DeFi and Staking Opportunities
data.description:
According to PANews, Blockdaemon, a provider of institutional blockchain infrastructure, has announced the launch of its DeFi and staking service, Earn Stack. This new offering aims to provide institutions with access to DeFi and staking opportunities across more than 50 protocols, along with access to numerous DeFi liquidity pools and cross-chain bridges.

Blockdaemon claims that Earn Stack adheres to the recent guidelines issued by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), ensuring secure, non-custodial staking and simplifying entry into the DeFi space. The company emphasizes its focus on institutional clients, highlighting its ISO 27001 cybersecurity certification and compliance with SOC 2 standards for customer data management.

Konstantin Richter, the founder of Blockdaemon, stated that the platform enables one-click integration of multi-chain staking and DeFi functionalities through institutional-grade APIs. Additionally, it offers customized API services for liquidity aggregation, standardized staking access, and yield tracking.

data.title: JUST DeFi Protocol Reaches $9.26 Billion TVL on TRON Blockchain
data.description: According to Odaily, the total value locked (TVL) in the JUST DeFi protocol on the TRON blockchain has reached $9.26 billion. This milestone underscores its strategic importance as a core DeFi infrastructure within the TRON ecosystem. As a leading DeFi protocol on TRON, JUST is committed to continuous innovation and upgrades. The protocol aims to enhance cross-chain asset exchanges and smart staking and lending services, striving to provide users with a safer and more efficient one-stop DeFi solution.

data.title: TikTok Denies Allegations of Purchasing TRUMP Coin Amid Political Accusations
data.description: According to Foresight News, TikTok's official policy account on X has refuted claims regarding its ownership acquiring TRUMP coin. The denial comes in response to accusations made by California Democratic Representative Brad Sherman. Sherman had previously alleged that TikTok's Chinese owner announced a $300 million purchase of TRUMP coin.

data.title: A player successfully grabbed UPTOP's first TGE by spending only $1.5 in Gas
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, the first successful purchase of UPTOP tokens launched on TGE at 17:00 today came from the address 0xE6e...d9697. On-chain data shows that the owner of this address had pre-deployed 4996 ammunition depot addresses holding 20 USD1 23 hours before the start of TGE, and initiated a rush purchase operation when it went online, successfully completing the first purchase with a Gas fee of about US$1.5.

data.title: Bank of England Governor Questions Need for Digital Pound
data.description: According to PANews, Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey recently expressed skepticism about the necessity of a consumer-facing digital pound during a conference in Kyiv, Ukraine. Bailey stated that he remains unconvinced of the need to create a new form of currency, marking the clearest official reservation regarding the "Britcoin" initiative. The project is currently in the design phase but faces public concerns over privacy and security, banking industry worries about deposit outflows, and warnings from the House of Lords Economic Affairs Committee that the risks may outweigh the benefits. Bailey noted that while progress is being made on wholesale central bank digital currencies for interbank settlements, the retail version still requires justification of its practical benefits.

data.title: OKX Wallet launches xBTC related activities, with a total prize pool of 1 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the first phase of xBTC is now online on Solana, and a series of related activities have been launched. From 15:00 (UTC+8) on June 20, users who deposit xBTC, USDT, USDG or SOL can participate in sharing the $1 million reward. In addition, the function of depositing to Kamino and the USDG loan reward will be launched soon.
